acquisition method: MS and MS/MS spectra were acquired in Data Dependent Acquisition (DDA) mode.
alkylation reagent: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM ammonium bicarbonate
cleavage agent: excised, trypsin digested, and analyzed by mass spectrometry
instrument: analyzed on an Orbitrap Eclipse Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: the mass spectrometry proteomics data have been deposited to the ProteomeXchange Consortium via the PRIDE partner repository
